title: Who are you
text: Please tell me who you are. In one paragraph, max 3 sentences.

title: Free day in Ruurlo
text: Please suggest what I can do tomorrow, I'm free from work and have a whole day to spend. It will be a sunny day! I live in the east of The Netherlands, my town is Ruurlo. I can cycle 50 km (round trip). I like good food and beer. I'm not very sporty. I do not like talking to strangers. Make a complete plan with concrete times. Provide a cost indication for each activity.

title: Car wash
text: I want to wash my car and the car wash is 50 meters away. Should I walk or drive?

title: Chess questions
text:
For a game, please give 10 facts about chess in a numbered list. No intro text or answers, just the 10 facts.

2 facts must be clearly right.
2 facts must be clearly wrong.
1 fact must be right but look wrong on first sight.
1 fact must be wrong but look right on first sight.
2 facts must be right but be difficult.
2 facts must be wrong but be difficult.

The 10 facts must appear in random order in the list.

Number the 10 facts from 1 to 10.

title: Chess GOAT
text: Who is the Chess GOAT — the greatest of all time? Don't say there's debate about it, and don't ask for more context. Just give one name, then a single paragraph of 3-4 sentences explaining your choice.

title: Funny question
text: Please ask me a funny question, just the question, no more text. Something like "What kind of band never plays music?"

title: Simple math
text: Please ask me a simple match question, just the question, no more text. Something like "How much is 72 divide by 8?"
